name: Eggnog Truffles
recipeInstructions:
Chocolate Cups:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and shortening in a heavy, small saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Spoon about 1/2 tablespoon of the chocolate mixture into each of about 36 small foil candy cups. Bring some of the chocolate up the side of each cup using the back of a spoon. Refrigerate until firm.
Truffles:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and butter in a heavy, medium saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Add eggnog to the melted mixture and stir to combine. Pour into a pie pan. Refrigerate until the mixture is thick but soft (about 2 hours).
3. Pipe the truffle mixture onto the chilled chocolate cups using a pastry bag fitted with a large star tip.
4. Truffles can be refrigerated for 2-3 days or frozen several weeks. To remove foil cups, cut a slit in the bottom of each cup and peel the foil up from the bottom (do not peel down from the top edge). Makes about 36 truffles.
